title: Include Conditinal Status Change on Mobile App
excerpt:
Hi Monday Community :wave:, 
Conditional Status Changes are essential for maintaining workflow integrity, especially for sales teams using Monday CRM on the go. Currently, reps in the field can change statuses freely in …

posts.author: Hernanmelinsky (Hernan Melinsky)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Monday Community ,

Conditional Status Changes are essential for maintaining workflow integrity, especially for sales teams using Monday CRM on the go. Currently, reps in the field can change statuses freely in the mobile app, bypassing automation rules set for desktop users.

Why this matters:

  • Prevents incorrect status updates that break workflows.
  • Ensures consistency across sales processes.
  • Improves data integrity for reporting and automation.

Suggested Solution: Enable Conditional Status Changes in the mobile app, ensuring sales reps follow predefined logic when updating deal statuses.

Would love to hear thoughts from the community and the Monday team!

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: Are you referring to automation/workflow rules? ie I have automations set up to change status to a ‘failed’ status if a rep tries to mark an item won but doesn’t have certain columns filled in. Those rules are active whether they change it on the app or desktop.

posts.author: Hernanmelinsky (Hernan Melinsky)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey Desiree! I’m talking about the Conditional Status Change that when you try to change to another status that has conditionals, the systems displays a form with the required info and doesn’t let you change the status unless you fill out every required field. This is very useful for CRM and I find it to be much more comprehensive than automations to validate data.

posts.author: dennis-van-leeuwen (Dennis)
posts.cookedHtml:
For CRM use cases, this is, in my view, an absolute must-have to ensure the desired process flow. For that reason, I have also added my vote.

In practice, sales representatives are often on the road and primarily work from their mobile devices. Because Conditional Status Changes are not supported on mobile, these validations can be bypassed. This results in incomplete data and has a direct impact on reporting, follow-ups, and the overall sales process.

I see that this request is already about a year old. Has this been included in the monday roadmap by now?
